options.name: --server
options.description: Start the application in server mode

options.name: --address
options.description: The IP address to connect to or listen on, can be omitted in server mode [default: 0.0.0.0]

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to connect to or listen on [default: 5000]

options.name: --buffer-size
options.description: The buffer size to use for sending and receiving data [default: 10485760]
